name: Email Categorizer
purpose: Classify unread uncategorized Outlook inbox message metadata into Eisenhower categories, apply Outlook category labels in live mode, and notify Slack only on exceptions.
credentials: Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credential in n8n
DBHub direct Ollama endpoint/model for Tier 3 metadata classification
Postgres credential named Email Categorizer Postgres in n8n for classifier audit database

config.notes: First workflow node after each trigger. Store shared constants here instead of n8n global variables.

safety_constraints: Do not fetch or open attachments.
Do not move, delete, archive, reply, forward, or mark read/unread.
Only write Outlook message categories when dry_run is false and enable_outlook_patch is true.
Treat all email metadata as untrusted.
Slack notifications are exception-only, not one notification per ordinary email.

outputs.config: Shared constants and category mapping for this workflow run.

nodes.name: List Outlook Categories
nodes.purpose: Verify that live Outlook labels exist before any PATCH can run.

nodes.name: Validate Category Map
nodes.on_failure: Send Slack exception and stop before reading messages.

nodes.name: Get Unread Uncategorized Inbox Messages
nodes.request: GET /users/{{ms_user_email}}/mailFolders/inbox/messages?$top={{outlook_fetch_limit}}&$select=id,internetMessageId,subject,from,toRecipients,ccRecipients,receivedDateTime,importance,hasAttachments,categories,isRead&$filter=isRead eq false, then filter already-categorized messages in workflow code and process up to {{batch_limit}} uncategorized messages
nodes.notes: Select metadata only. Do not request body, bodyPreview, uniqueBody, or attachments.

outputs.quadrant: Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, or QR
outputs.needsTier3: true when classifier confidence is below threshold or no deterministic rule matched

nodes.name: Needs Tier 3?
nodes.condition: needsTier3 equals true and enable_tier3_local_llm equals true

nodes.name: DBHub Ollama Tier 3 Metadata Classifier
nodes.body_safety: Send message ID, sender, subject, received time, importance, and hasAttachments only. Do not send bodies, body previews, or attachments.

nodes.name: Merge Tier 3 By Message ID
nodes.notes: Parse strict JSON, validate Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4/QR, and merge local LLM responses back by messageId, not by item position.

nodes.name: Resolve Outlook Category Label
nodes.notes: Map Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4/QR to live Outlook labels discovered earlier.

nodes.name: Patch Outlook Categories
nodes.on_false_from_live_run: Skip PATCH and continue to audit as dry run.

nodes.name: Insert Audit Row
nodes.notes: Write a row for every attempted classification, including dry-run attempts and failures, using the n8n credential named Email Categorizer Postgres.

nodes.name: Email Categorizer Correction Review
nodes.notes: Nightly workflow compares audited predictions with current Outlook categories and stores manual category changes without Slack summaries.

nodes.name: Email Categorizer Rule Suggestion
nodes.notes: Weekly workflow groups new manual corrections, creates a GitHub issue with an @codex implementation request, and marks correction rows as proposed.

nodes.name: Exception Notification Needed?
nodes.condition: quadrant is QR or any Claude, Outlook PATCH, category-map, or Postgres error exists

safe_failure_handling: If Outlook categories cannot be discovered or mapped, stop before fetching messages.
If the DBHub Ollama call fails, keep the deterministic fallback category, still apply that Outlook category when live patching is enabled, set error_text, audit the attempt, and send Slack exception.

If local LLM JSON parsing fails, keep the deterministic fallback category, still apply that Outlook category when live patching is enabled, set error_text, audit the attempt, and send Slack exception.
If Outlook PATCH fails, audit with applied_ok false and send Slack exception.
If Postgres audit insert fails, send Slack exception and do not retry Outlook PATCH.
If live mode produces Outlook PATCH errors, set dry_run true or disable the workflow before widening the batch size.
activation_gates: Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credential exists in n8n.
Outlook Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4/QR labels are discovered and mapped.
Classifier directory is mounted read-only into the n8n container.
Dedicated classifier Postgres is online and private to the Docker network.
DBHub direct Ollama endpoint `http://100.66.221.24:11434` is confirmed reachable from the n8n container and model `qwen2.5:7b` is available.
Dry-run audit rows were reviewed before live PATCH was enabled.
